MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Plaintiff appearing by and through counsel, Arnold W. Evje, Esq. and Nicole Lambron, Esq. appearing for the defendant. The parties settled per stipulation, not on record. Trial date vacated.
